case_title: REYNALDO L SANTILLAN VS. ROBERT DUNLOP ET AL.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-21-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-21-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF REYNALDO SANTILLAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ROBERT DUNLOP IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUILLERMO MUGPOC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTOR MUGPOC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHARLES WEAVER IS PRESENT. ALL FOUR DEFENDANTS DO NOT DISPUTE SERVICE AND IN ADDITION ALL FOUR DEFENDANT'S INDICATED WILLINGNESS TO WAIVE THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE TO PROCEED WITH THE MATTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,450.00 FILED BY SANTILLAN, REYNALDO L AS TO DEFENDANT DUNLOP, ROBERT ASST. MGR. GRANDA HOTEL MOGPUC, GUILLERMO MOGPUC, VICTOR WEAVER, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED FEB-01-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, CHARLES

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTILLAN, REYNALDO L ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED FEB-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOGPUC, VICTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTILLAN, REYNALDO L IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUNLOP, ROBERT ASST. MGR. GRANDA HOTEL MOGPUC, GUILLERMO MOGPUC, VICTOR WEAVER, CHARLES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SUB. SERVICE MADE ON CHARLES WEAVER) (IFP: $0.00) SERVED FEB-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUNLOP, ROBERT ASST. MGR. GRANDA HOTEL
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED FEB-01-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MOGPUC, GUILLERMO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2018 - JUDGMENT.
